regime_fall.current_status: U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports is now operationally implemented as of April 13, while Iran's interim leadership responds with military warnings and diplomatic accusations of bad faith. Israeli strikes continue against Iranian regime institutions, compounding pressure on an economically isolated state managing succession uncertainty and severe internal repression.
regime_fall.last_major_event: U.S. Central Command confirmed implementation of comprehensive naval blockade on all maritime traffic to and from Iranian ports, marking escalation from announcement to active enforcement.
